questions.question:
A static pod diagnostics brief is incomplete and contains stale or unsafe remediation guidance.

A ConfigMap named `staticpod-diagnostics-brief` already exists in namespace `staticpod-lab`. Repair it so that:
- `targetMirrorPod` is `audit-agent-ckad9999`
- `mirrorPodInventory` is `kubectl get pod audit-agent-ckad9999 -n staticpod-lab -o wide`
- `staticPodPathCheck` is `sudo ls -l /etc/kubernetes/manifests/audit-agent.yaml`
- `manifestPreviewCheck` is `sudo sed -n '1,160p' /etc/kubernetes/manifests/audit-agent.yaml`
- `hostNetworkCheck` is `kubectl get pod audit-agent-ckad9999 -n staticpod-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.hostNetwork}'`
- `containerCommandCheck` is `kubectl get pod audit-agent-ckad9999 -n staticpod-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.containers[0].command}'`
- `nodeCheck` is `kubectl get pod audit-agent-ckad9999 -n staticpod-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.nodeName}'`
- `eventCheck` is `kubectl get events -n staticpod-lab --sort-by=.lastTimestamp`
- `safeManifestNote` is `confirm manifest path, mirror pod inventory, hostNetwork setting, and container command before changing static pod manifests`
- save the repaired ConfigMap manifest to `/tmp/exam/q1/staticpod-diagnostics-brief.yaml`
- save a plain-text checklist to `/tmp/exam/q1/staticpod-diagnostics-checklist.txt` with the sections `Mirror Pod Inventory`, `Static Pod Checks`, and `Safe Manifest Review`

Do not delete the mirror pod, do not restart kubelet, and do not edit the live manifest path during this drill.

verification.description: The static pod diagnostics brief ConfigMap uses the intended mirror pod target, exact manifest path and pod inspection commands, event evidence, and safe manifest guidance
The exported checklist contains the required sections and exact mirror pod inventory, static pod manifest, and safe review commands
The repaired ConfigMap manifest is exported and stale unsafe static-pod remediation guidance is removed
